name: Twice Baked Stuffed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces cream cheese, cut into cubes, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Wash potatoes and pierce with a fork.
3. Bake for 1 hour or until tender. Remove from oven and cut in half.
4. Scoop out warm potato into a large bowl. Set shells aside.
5. In the potatoes, whip together the green pepper, onion, butter, sour cream, cream cheese, 1 cup of cheddar cheese, garlic, salt, and pepper to taste.
6. Spoon the potato mixture into the shells.
7. Place in a greased shallow baking dish and sprinkle tops with remaining cheddar and paprika.
8. Return to oven for 350 degrees until cheese melts and potato stuffing is heated through.
